name: Skinny Pinwheels
recipeIngredient: 4 flour tortillas, low fat, 1 gram fat each
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix cream cheese, ranch dressing mix, and green onions until combined.
2. Spread the mixture evenly on the tortillas.
3. Drain the pimientos, chop the green chiles, and slice the black olives (if using).
4. Sprinkle an equal amount of drained pimientos, chopped chiles, and sliced olives over the cream cheese mixture.
5. Roll up the tortillas tightly around the filling. Place seam side down in a dish.
6. Chill for at least 2 hours before serving.
7. Cut rolls into 1-inch pieces.
8. Serve with the spiral side up.
